/CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X:THE COURT ORDERS THE PREVIOUS SENTENCE BE VACATED FOR GOOD LEGAL CAUSE, THE COURT RE-SENTENCES THE PAROLEE AS FOLLOWS:/3000REIN/PAJ:88 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  44  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:AS A CONDITION OF PAROLE, CLIENT MUST DO TREATMENT AS DEEMED APPROPRIATEBY THE SAN FRANCISCO ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT,/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO: 06,27,14/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPONRELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/

/CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X:THE DA'S OR PAROLE'S MOTION TO AMEND THE PETITION TOALLEGE VIOLATION #7- FAILURE TO FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS, IS GRANTED,/WIAPTR//3000ADV/3000ADM/X:THE PAROLEE'S ADMISSION IS AS TO VIOLATION #2-#7 ONLY,//3000REIN/PAJ:64 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  21  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:THE COURT DISMISSES VIOLATIONS #1, ABSCONDING, FOR LACK OF EVIDENCE,//X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO:06-27-14 FOR GOOD LEGAL CAUSE WITH NO LOSS OF TIME/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PER PAROLE AGENT,/
/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS AND THE COURT FINDS PROBABLE CAUSE,/NB/CONTD:TO SET OR DISPO/
/CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC 3000,08//CONTD:CONFIRM RESTITUTION/
